positive: A sophisticated, stylized illustration of a mystical forest landscape. The scene should feature exaggerated, ornate floral elements, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, and intertwined ancient tree roots, all rendered with a detailed woodcut/etching style. Use deep indigo, emerald green, and glowing gold accents for a dramatic, high-contrast color palette. Composition must be circular and symmetrical, perfect for a chest print on an apparel item. Strong, clean silhouettes against a slightly darker background, giving a regal, ethereal, and maximalist feel. Highly detailed line work, graphic novel aesthetic, clean vector lines, studio lighting, centered composition.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, jpeg artifacts, grain, noise, messy
